Bullet Point 1: Special Note: Our spices do not have anti-caking or anti clumping agents or other harmful additives, hence with a sticky product like our mango powder, natural clumping will occur. This does not indicate that the product is old or bad, just all natural!
Bullet Point 2: 🥭You'll LOVE our Amchur Ground by Rani Brand--Here's Why:
Bullet Point 3: 🥭Now KOSHER! 100% Natural, No preservatives or Fillers, All Natural, Non-GMO, Gluten Friendly, PREMIUM Gourmet Food Grade Spice.
Bullet Point 4: 🥭Packed in a no barrier Plastic Jar, let us tell you how important that is when handling Indian Spices!

Product Description: Amchur powder is made form unripe mangoes which have been sliced, sun-dried and then ground into powder. Mangoes themselves are indigenous to India and Malaysia. This spice is confined chiefly to Indian cuisine. It adds a tart, sour flavor to curries, chutneys and vegetable dishes.
Value: 16.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium gourmet spice positioned as a specialty Indian ingredient with strong organic and natural claims, including Kosher certification. The 16oz (454g) plastic jar packaging emphasizes authenticity and artisanal quality, targeting health-conscious and culturally specific consumers. Absence of additives and preservatives justifies a higher price point compared to standard processed spices, while the 'premium gourmet' branding suggests a niche, value-driven market segment.
